name: Content
description: New or updated educational content for a hall or topic
title: "[Content] "
labels: ["content"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## Hall / Section
        <!-- e.g. Hall 2: The Case Itself -->

        ## Depth level
        - [ ] L1 (1 min)
        - [ ] L2 (5 min)
        - [ ] L3 (20 min)
        - [ ] L4 (Research file)

        ## Description
        What content needs to be written or updated?

        ## Sources
        List primary sources for factual claims.

        ## BUILD_PLAN step
        <!-- Optional: which step # does this complete? -->
